text: I am so happy today, everything is going great
aaj mein bohat khush hoon, sab acha ja raha hai
yaar aaj bohat khush hoon, everything is just perfect
I am extremely angry about this situation
mujhe is baat par bohat gussa hai
yaar mujhe is situation par bohat gussa aa raha hai
I feel really sad about what happened
jo hua us par mujhe bohat dukh hua
what happened us baat se mujhe bohat dukh hua hai
